section.about.title: About
about.title: A Brief Introduction
about.value.identity: I'm a software developer who enjoys building practical software that solves real problems. I value thoughtful design, clean architecture, and tools that remain useful long after they're finished.
about.value.outputs: My work includes desktop applications, automation systems, and lightweight integration tools built primarily with Python, C#, and JavaScript. I focus on reliability, maintainability, and user experience.
about.value.approach: Most of what I know comes from building real projects. I start with a problem, explore possible solutions, then iterate until the software is stable and genuinely useful. AI helps accelerate the process, but every technical decision is reviewed and refined by me.
about.value.purpose: Every project in this portfolio started with a practical need—automating repetitive work, simplifying workflows, or improving everyday tasks. I prefer creating software that people can actually use over building projects just to showcase technologies.
